---
title: "The Rev. Latham Wickham"
---

## The Rev. Latham Wickham

**Dates:** (b. 1833/4)

### Description

son of Rev. Robert Wickham

### Biography

He was master of Twyford School 1860-2, headmaster 1862-87 [Alumni Oxonienses]

### Letters

- Letter from Aug 12 [1867]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
